title: Storyboard · "Knock" — Radio→Animation production script · S6
body:
**Scene 6: 05:30–07:00 · Flashback · Grace**

HERO FRAME: A hallway in the apartment building · 1949 wallpaper, brass numbers on doors · the door to 4-B partly open · sunlight streaming through it · a single house plant in the hall pot

MOTION: kling — the door of 4-B opens a few more inches by itself, as if from a draft. Dust motes drift in the sunbeam. The house plant's leaves stir once.

MOOD: A door that should not be open.

AUDIO: Walter (narration, gentler): *"There was a woman who lived in the apartment across the hall. Her name was Grace. She was older than me by some years. She was kind. We did not know each other well. But when she stopped answering her door — that was the first one."*

source.label: Dimension X episode #05 (NBC Radio, May 6, 1950) adapting Fredric Brown's 1948 short-short story "Knock" (originally in *Thrilling Wonder Stories*, December 1948)

author: matt

witnesses.label: Rufinus of Aquileia, Commentary on the Apostles' Creed (c. AD 404)
Pirminius, De singulis libris canonicis scarapsus (c. AD 750) — earliest received form
Cited by every major catechism since 8th century
